title: Xuan Luo/Items
content:
Items
[
]

Nine Weapons
[
]

Dragon Emperor Whip
[
1
]
: It was formed by refining the soul and body of a mid stage 
Void Tribulant
 Celestial Dragon which was one of the overlords of the wild lands of the eastern outskirts of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
. It contains the Dragon Emperor Heavenly Spirit and boasts a massive body that could easily overshadow the 
Nether Beast
. It has a single horn with a square tip which almost looks like the crown of an emperor and two dragon whiskers that are thousands of feet long with purplish-black scales adorning its entire body.

Mountain Demon
[
2
]
: This weapon was formed by refining an ancient mountain on the Immortal Astral Continent that gained sentience and became a demon. Countless souls were sacrificed until it became a celestial demon. It is able to safeguard the soul. It is a heaven-piercing snowy mountain which seems endlessly tall.

Sword Celestial
[
2
]
: This weapon was formed by refining 99,999 broken planets around the edges of the Immortal Astral Continent and refining the souls of an equal amount of 
celestials
. It is a fierce sword that causes celestials to feel fear.

Wind Devil Tablet
[
2
]
: This weapon was formed by refining a devil for three reincarnations and, over the countless years, gathering the evil intent of 3.6 billion evil people. It has already gained intelligence and can be considered a devil spirit. It absorbs the power of worship. Xuan Luo used it as a seal so that the 
Cave World
 cultivators' memories won’t be damaged or go missing while they reincarnate. Then, once they all are awakened, all their memories would be restored. It would also make it so that unless another 
Grand Empyrean
 searched their soul, no one else could find out the identity of their previous life.
